tool.name: news_bulk_search
tool.description: Search multiple queries on Google News in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling news_search multiple times - it is faster and more efficient. Pass all queries as a single comma-separated string. Example: 'AI regulation,climate summit,tech layoffs'.

parameters.name: queries
parameters.description: Comma-separated search queries (e.g. 'artificial intelligence,quantum computing,space exploration')
